message: Hey team!:rocket: Can you believe it's been 8 fantastic years for Online Boutique?
Before we dive into anniversary celebrations, let's give a warm welcome to Maya, our new Security Analyst. She's got 5 years of cybersecurity expertise under her belt! :clap:
Hi everyone! :raised_hand_with_fingers_splayed: Thrilled to be here, especially on such a special occasion. Let's make Online Boutique even successful and secure together!
Welcome, Maya! Your experience will elevate our cybersecurity efforts.
Excited to have you, Maya! Bez has been very excited to have you on the team.
Impressive! Eager to learn from you, Maya.
:+1: Welcome Maya, pleasure meeting you.
Hi Maya! Your experience is top-notch. Cheers to you and to Online Boutique's 8-year anniversary! :partying_face: :tada:
Thanks for the warm welcome! Excited for the celebration and our anniversary party.

Welcome to The Switch, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
We are all so glad you have joined us Maya
Hold on, team. Quick check-in. Is anyone else experiencing internet problems or slow connectivity?

Perhaps it could be due to the increase of sales we have been having with this anniversary sale?

Hamed and I will have been monitoring outbound traffic. Checking for anomalies again.

seems to be global

not all users are reporting this issue, we have about 150 reports on this so far
Everything still working for me, no lags, all wwork as expected
This is an intermittent issue but impacting users
*Incident Number INC100090:* create P4 Intermittent issues with bet placement
@shay has there been and changes done lately?
:star: Check changes done to the platform
@PLAYER Reports are increasing. Get on top of it fast before it comes down to a full failure
Latest changes : https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/NGRkNTNhZDVjZDUyNDU5NDk2Yjg3NzcxMTE1YjkxOTA

Shall i check the logs to find any potential issues ?
incident created and we are currently investigatiog

Incident summary: Intermittent global platform slowness and connectivity issues reported during anniversary sale with some users unable to access site or experiencing timeouts while others unaffected.
 Impact: Approximately 150 user reports of slow load times, timeouts and inability to access site, issue appears global and intermittent while internal users also report slow or inaccessible internal sites. 
Start date/time: 17/02/2026, 15:09 UTC. 
Next steps: - Validate scope and affected regions - Review outbound traffic anomalies from data centre - Check infrastructure load related to anniversary sale traffic - Continue monitoring player complaints and error rates
Is it a global issue ?
yes @daniel please check
I'm seeing lot of network timeouts. Probably platform team could help us here more
Issue currently seems to be on high load. Are our servers able to handle that load?
@hamed Could you please check into it asap
Do we have a working theory to fix this issue ?
we are currently receiving intermittent issues on placing orders and players complaint slowness
:star: Qualify the problem
Sure let me test the network infra
Checking the chats so far , i've got a theory
This is currently global, issues come from network timeouts. Hamed already investigating
Working on findting the fix
This is a network issue

There is a spike in outbound connections in the edge router and the origin IP block 10.50.0.0/24. That IP range is the same as the IP block the frontend and payments are hosted on. Could this be related to a change made?
@shay could you confirm if any changes are related to @hamed theory?
:star: Facts over opinion
:star: Reviewed changes
@PLAYER let me know if you would like to me to rollback any change
@daniel @tanya could you also please check
There is a change made into payments app around 24 hrs ago
Not sure if this might be causing network issue here
Checking
I dont think this looks like a change issue
After my change there are successful payments
@daniel could you please advise further?
why you think that
issue is intermittent so there are succesfull payments aswell

mentioned change:
Change ID: CHG89675

Owner: Daniel

Service: PaymentService

Environment: PROD

Version: 1.7

Description: Deployed version update to add support for new card issuer integration and improve payment logging.

Time Of Change: 24 hours ago
Yeah right . If change would be cause then all payments would've failed
Intermittent issue is pointing towards issue into network infra only
I agree
Spike in outbound connections are very abnormal. I'd suggest we bring in SecOps into this

@maya Could you please look into it? we are suspecting network (infra) issues here. We have couple of changes done today, but as confirmed with Daniel, his change applied to Payments would couse overall unavailablily, we are currently havbing intermittent issues.
i will take a look into this now
:star: Manage actions and timings
Give me a moment
Also currently we have high load on network
Whats the current update ?
Just ran a network security scan and our issues all seem to be related to our network switch trying to figure out what exactly
I'm helping Maya to check more into networks
From log severity, i can see highedrload on Frontend_debug and Currencyservixe_Info
Its suspicious

Our investigation uncovered a critical issue: the network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities. We have identified a BotNet in the switch and it's creating outbound connections to the outside. It creates a DDOS (Distributed Denial of Service) to attack an external party
network switch had unpatched vulnerabilities, leaving it susceptible to known exploits. Attackers had exploited these vulnerabilities, leading to the compromise of the switch's integrity
We have included secops to the investigation, we suspect sth on  network isssue
:star: Form an effective investigation team
This means that The disruptions in outbound connections are affecting our internal company's users and the external global customer base.
Are thgese attack still ongoing?
We could restart the switch to fix it faster ?
@maya
Yes there is a botnet in the switch causing this
restart it and please ensure there are no vulnerabilities for attackers
switch has been restarted
Ok doing it now

Hopefully restarting was the correct solution

@bob kindly let us know if any player complaints are coming in

No worries Maya I can send over the graph of the network infra if you wanna look at it

Looking at the diagram now, will need a moment to figure out what to do next

Hemed confirmed that Infected Cisco Catalyst 9300 core switch was identified, patched and traffic failed over to a redundant Cisco Catalyst 2960 switch to restore network stability
:star: Confirm resolution with the business

Cheers, everyone! Resolving these network issues added a bit of spice to our celebration
Good job team! We managed to keep the anniversary vibe alive despite the detour.
High-fives all around!  I will take out that faulty switch as soon as possible.
The website's performance is looking solid again
We are safe from the attacks, no customer complaints,. all working
Great , thanks @Armin
